nodes.proof:
rewrite (Nat.mul_comm b q), (Nat.mod_mul q b), (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b), (Nat.add_0_l), (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b).
- sfirstorder.
- sauto lq: on.
attempts: rewrite (Nat.mod_mul_left_mod b q (Nat.lt_0_neq b (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_0_l r) r_lt_b))), (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b), Nat.add_0_l, (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b); reflexivity.
rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). rewrite (Nat.mod_mul b q). rewrite Nat.add_0_l. rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). reflexivity.

rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). rewrite (Nat.mod_mul_left_mod b q (fun H => Nat.not_lt_zero r (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_eq r_lt_b H))). rewrite Nat.add_0_l. rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). reflexivity.
rewrite (Nat.mod_mul_left_mod b q). rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). simpl. exact (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b).

destruct b as [| b'].
- inversion r_lt_b.
- rewrite (Nat.mod_small r (S b') r_lt_b). rewrite (Nat.mod_mul_left_mod q (S b') (Nat.succ_neq_zero b')). rewrite Nat.add_0_l. rewrite (Nat.mod_small r (S b') r_lt_b). reflexivity.

rewrite (Nat.mod_add_mod (Init.Nat.mul b q) r b). apply (Nat.mod_unique (Init.Nat.mul b q + r) b q r).
- reflexivity.
- exact r_lt_b.
rewrite (Nat.mod_mul_left_mod b q). rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). rewrite (Nat.add_0_l r). rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). reflexivity.

rewrite (Nat.mul_comm b q), (Nat.mod_mul q b), (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b), (Nat.add_0_l), (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b).
- sfirstorder.
- sauto lq: on.
failed_attempts: rewrite (Nat.mod_mul_left_mod b q (Nat.lt_0_neq b (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_0_l r) r_lt_b))), (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b), Nat.add_0_l, (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b); reflexivity.
rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). rewrite (Nat.mod_mul b q). rewrite Nat.add_0_l. rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). reflexivity.

rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). rewrite (Nat.mod_mul_left_mod b q (fun H => Nat.not_lt_zero r (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_eq r_lt_b H))). rewrite Nat.add_0_l. rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). reflexivity.
rewrite (Nat.mod_mul_left_mod b q). rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). simpl. exact (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b).

rewrite (Nat.mod_add_mod (Init.Nat.mul b q) r b). apply (Nat.mod_unique (Init.Nat.mul b q + r) b q r).
- reflexivity.
- exact r_lt_b.
rewrite (Nat.mod_mul_left_mod b q). rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). rewrite (Nat.add_0_l r). rewrite (Nat.mod_small r b r_lt_b). reflexivity.
